description: Resolve silent failures in push notifications for Android 14 users to ensure all notifications are delivered successfully.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an Android 14 user WHEN they receive a push notification THEN the notification should be delivered without failure.

description: Implement a three-tier priority system for notifications to visually differentiate between urgent, normal, and low-priority alerts, ensuring critical messages are not overlooked.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are categorized by priority THEN the user can see visual indicators for urgent, normal, and low-priority notifications.

description: Create a user preference page that allows users to opt in/out of specific notification categories, providing granular control over their notification settings.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification preferences page WHEN they select notification categories THEN their preferences should be saved and reflected in notification delivery.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics to ensure compliance with latency and delivery success criteria.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN notifications are sent THEN performance metrics should be tracked and alerts triggered for any anomalies.

description: Implement changes to reduce notification delivery latency from the current p95 of 340ms to under 200ms by moving to asynchronous database writes and batch processing.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the notification delivery system is updated WHEN notifications are sent THEN the p95 latency should be under 200ms.

description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into digest formats, optimizing delivery timing based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN the user receives a digest at optimal times.

story_title: Address Accessibility Concerns in Notification Center
description: Improve the design of the notification center to enhance accessibility for users with screen readers and colorblind individuals.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with accessibility needs accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate through notifications THEN they should be able to do so without barriers.

story_title: Conduct User Testing for Notification Features
description: Perform user testing sessions to validate the effectiveness of new notification features and gather qualitative feedback.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN new notification features are implemented WHEN user testing is conducted THEN feedback should be collected and analyzed for improvements.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Implement a mechanism to gather user feedback on notification preferences and delivery effectiveness to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit their preferences THEN their feedback should be recorded for analysis.

description: Create a feedback loop mechanism to inform users about the status of their notifications (delivered, read, etc.) to enhance user engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives a notification WHEN they check the status THEN they should see whether it was delivered and read.
